stories.title: After 20 years I turned off Google Adsense for my websites

stories.summary: 一款开源的macOS本地“按住说话”语音转文字工具，强调隐私与便捷。

stories.title: Sam Altman may control our future – can he be trusted?
stories.summary: 《纽约客》深度报道，探讨Sam Altman在AI行业的影响力及其潜在的信任危机。

stories.summary: 针对AI编程代理（Coding Agents）设计的自动化沙箱测试环境。

stories.title: A cryptography engineer's perspective on quantum computing timelines
stories.summary: 加密工程专家从技术底层视角分析量子计算落地的实际时间表。

stories.title: Show HN: GovAuctions lets you browse government auctions at once

stories.title: Issue: Claude Code is unusable for complex engineering tasks with Feb updates

max_score.title: Sam Altman may control our future – can he be trusted?

most_discussed.title: Issue: Claude Code is unusable for complex engineering tasks with Feb updates

morning.summary: 本期Hacker News焦点集中在AI领域的深度博弈，包括对Claude Code工程局限性的激烈讨论，以及对Sam Altman权力边界的伦理审视。此外，开发者工具创新依然活跃，涉及macOS语音交互、AI代理沙箱及内存优化等实用开源项目。
